Chronology of every recorded fact about [[soulspace]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — A person can only carry one object at a time in their soulspace.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — A soulspace can be used to hold simple constructs at the center of a person's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon can store objects in his soulspace.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Sacred instruments must be carried in a soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Items can be kept in soulspace.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue is inside Yerin's soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon has a soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Constructs can explode from a soulspace.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon drew his bow into his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan can reach his spiritual perception into his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Soulspace is a place where items like hammers can be stored.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Lindon can produce items from his soulspace.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
